name: Banana Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and mash the banana. Place it in a large jar.
2. Add the vodka, ensuring the banana is completely covered.
3. Securely close the jar and let steep for one week.
4. Pour the contents through a wire strainer to remove most of the banana.
5. Add the sugar syrup. Strain the solution through cheesecloth a couple of times
to remove remaining small particles of banana and any cloudiness.
6. Add the vanilla extract, then shake well.
7. Enjoy.
